allow: PowerShell($d = Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($d\){ "docker CLI => $\($d.Source\)" } else { "docker CLI NOT on PATH yet" }; "--- exe check ---"; if\(Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\resources\\bin\\docker.exe'\){ "Docker installed at C:\\Program Files\\Docker" }; "--- wsl status ---"; wsl --status 2>&1 | Out-String)
